# AI Freedom Institute

> Empowering Students with AI Skills for the Future

AI Freedom Institute provides practical, hands-on AI training for 4 audiences: Schools, Corporate Teams, Individual Learners, and Business Owners. We deliver interactive AI workshops, productivity training, and career-focused AI courses across India — no coding required. Founded by Ajit (AI Finance Guy) — AI trainer and creator, author of 3 books, 32 AI projects delivered, speaker at webinars, seminars and courses across India.

- Phone: +91 8007280721
- Email: info@aifreedom.in
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918007280721
- Website: https://aifreedom.in

## Pages

- [Home](https://aifreedom.in/): Hub page — 4 AI program funnels, features, testimonials, stats
- [Schools](https://aifreedom.in/schools): 1-hour AI awareness workshops for school & college students
- [Corporate](https://aifreedom.in/corporate): AI productivity & automation training for teams — save 2-3 hours daily
- [Individuals](https://aifreedom.in/individuals): Learn AI skills (image gen, video, content, freelancing) — no coding
- [Business](https://aifreedom.in/business): AI-powered marketing, lead gen, content & operations for business owners
- [Contact](https://aifreedom.in/contact): Book a free demo — form, phone, email, WhatsApp
- [Course Hub](https://aifreedom.in/Course): OTT-style course catalog with AI courses from ₹499
